scope: Function-level nodes and edges for the 11 active [OperationContract]s on ITdmMmsToolData co-hosted with ITdmToolData in TdmToolData.cs. Per docs/security-review/traces/T12-itdmmmstooldata-surface.md: zero of the 11 ops queue scripts via dictMsgIdTplScrParamList.TryAdd, so none extend the wire-driven SQLi spine from T01.

nodes_added.name: ITdmMmsToolData
nodes_added.summary: TDM-internal WCF ServiceContract co-hosted with ITdmToolData on TdmMmsToolDataService. 11 active [OperationContract]s + 3 commented out. No [FaultContract] decorations; all ops report via short return + ref string sExceptionMsg.

nodes_added.name: IMmsToolData (duplex callback)
nodes_added.summary: Fastems contract for TDM-as-client → MMS-as-server direction. Used as the duplex callback channel; TdmToolData stores per-system callback proxies in dictMmsNameCallback and pushes outbound messages.

nodes_added.name: TdmToolData::MMSSetToolNominals
nodes_added.summary: ITdmMmsToolData [OperationContract]. Parses sToolNominals string into XmlDocument (line 1099) and forwards outbound to MMS client via dictMmsNameCallback[sMmsSystemName].SetToolNominals (line 1121). Does NOT call CallScript or queue into dictMsgIdTplScrParamList.

nodes_added.name: TdmToolData::MMSSetNcProgramToolList
nodes_added.summary: ITdmMmsToolData [OperationContract]. Parses sNcProgramToolList into XmlDocument (line 1187) and forwards outbound to MMS client via dictMmsNameCallback[sMmsSystemName].SetNcProgramToolList (line 1208). No script dispatch.

nodes_added.name: TdmToolData::MMSSetSisterTool
nodes_added.summary: ITdmMmsToolData [OperationContract]. Parses sSisterTool into XmlDocument (line 1275) and forwards outbound to MMS client via dictMmsNameCallback[sMmsSystemName].SetSisterTool (line 1296). No script dispatch.

nodes_added.name: TdmToolData::MMSSetToolActuals
nodes_added.summary: ITdmMmsToolData [OperationContract]. Parses sToolActuals into XmlDocument (line 1363) and forwards outbound to MMS client via dictMmsNameCallback[sMmsSystemName].SetToolActuals (line 1384). No script dispatch.

nodes_added.name: TdmToolData::GetConnectedMmsSystem
nodes_added.summary: ITdmMmsToolData [OperationContract]. Returns dictMmsNameCallback.Keys.ToList() (line 1428). Pure in-memory state, no wire→DB or wire→script path.

nodes_added.name: TdmToolData::IsMessageAccepted
nodes_added.summary: ITdmMmsToolData [OperationContract]. Looks up messageID in dictMsgIdTplAcceptText (line 1457). Pure in-memory state, no wire→DB or wire→script path.

nodes_added.name: TdmToolData::GenerateMsgID
nodes_added.summary: ITdmMmsToolData [OperationContract]. Pops and returns first entry from lstMsgPool (lines 1510-1511). Pure in-memory state, no wire→DB or wire→script path.

nodes_added.name: TdmToolData::StartServiceLog
nodes_added.summary: ITdmMmsToolData [OperationContract]. Calls File.CreateText(sLogFileName) at line 1545 with wire-controlled path. Validation is only Path.GetDirectoryName != "" (line 1539); UNC, traversal, and system paths are accepted. LocalSystem write primitive — see F-T12.2. No script dispatch.

nodes_added.name: TdmToolData::StopServiceLog
nodes_added.summary: ITdmMmsToolData [OperationContract]. Closes the log file handle. No wire parameter, no script dispatch.

nodes_added.name: TdmToolData::SetLogLevel
nodes_added.summary: ITdmMmsToolData [OperationContract]. byte.Parse(sLogLevel) at line 1596. No script dispatch, no file/DB path.

nodes_added.name: TdmToolData::GetLogLevel
nodes_added.summary: ITdmMmsToolData [OperationContract]. Returns current logLevel. No wire parameter, no script dispatch.

edges_added.note: dictMmsNameCallback[sMmsSystemName].SetToolNominals(messageID, xmlToolNominals) — outbound to connected MMS client, not into TdmSkriptPlus/SQL.
dictMmsNameCallback[sMmsSystemName].SetNcProgramToolList(messageID, xmlNcProgramToolList) — outbound to connected MMS client.
dictMmsNameCallback[sMmsSystemName].SetSisterTool(messageID, sisterTool) — outbound to connected MMS client.
dictMmsNameCallback[sMmsSystemName].SetToolActuals(messageID, xmlToolActuals) — outbound to connected MMS client.
TdmToolData : ITdmToolData, ITdmMmsToolData — class implements both contracts.

notes: Resolves the T04 Open question 'ITdmMmsToolData operation count and surface'. Verdict F-T12.1: zero of the 11 ITdmMmsToolData operations queue scripts via dictMsgIdTplScrParamList.TryAdd; the WCF→script enqueue sites in TdmToolData.cs (lines 589/641/698/817/982) are all inside ITdmToolData operations. The 4 MMSSet* operations forward wire-controlled XML strings outbound through the IMmsToolData duplex callback channel rather than into TdmSkriptPlus. F-T12.2 (StartServiceLog arbitrary-file-write under LocalSystem) and F-T12.3 (MMSSet* outbound poisoning primitive) are non-SQLi findings recorded for the rewrite. Three commented-out [OperationContract]s (MMSConnect, MMSDisconnect, MessageResult) are not enumerated as active surface today.
